description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a sprawling single-story layout, featuring a combination of flat and gable roofs. The structure includes a prominent attached double garage, large glass windows and sliding doors, and a mix of white and gray exterior finishes. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several trees and green lawns. The rear facade showcases expansive glass panels, likely leading to living spaces that open to the backyard. The overall design emphasizes open, airy interiors and strong indoor-outdoor connectivity. The architectural style is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat and gable roofs, large glass windows, and an attached double garage, set within a landscaped yard and surrounded by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage side, boundary wall, and a cluster of trees in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass sliding doors, backyard lawn, and the open, modern facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing driveway, side entrance, and additional yard space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
